content.full_text:
February 22, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
Attn: Jonathan Rothman, Esq.
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Dear Mr. Rothman:

In January, 1991, your office issued an oral opinion that the Berkeley Rent Stabilization Board could not pay for legal representation for Rent Board Commissioners David Bryden and Kathleen DeVries in an election contest challenging their right to serve on the Board. The oral opinion was that such an expenditure of funds would violate Government Code section 85300. We would request a written confirmation of this opinion.

Thank you very much for your consideration. Please call if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

MANUELA ALBUQUERQUE
City Attorney

BRIAN KELLY
Deputy City Attorney

cc: David Bryden
    Kathleen DeVries
